title: FirstGreeter
description: A Minecraft plugin that rewards the first player to welcome new joiners, featuring persistent leaderboards, customizable command-based rewards, smart cooldown systems, and full configuration options to build a friendly server community.
body:
# FirstGreeter - Reward Players for Welcoming New Members! 🎉

**Automatically reward the first player to welcome new joiners to your server.**

FirstGreeter creates a welcoming community by rewarding players who greet newcomers first. With persistent leaderboards, customizable rewards, and flexible cooldowns, this plugin encourages positive first impressions.

## 🎯 Features

✅ **First-to-Welcome System** - Fastest greeter gets the reward  
✅ **Customizable Rewards** - Execute any command (economy, items, XP, permissions)  
✅ **Persistent Leaderboards** - Track top welcomers across restarts  
✅ **Smart Detection** - Multiple welcome phrases supported  
✅ **Cooldown System** - Per-player and global cooldown options  
✅ **Admin Tools** - Stats, reset, and management commands  
✅ **Hot Reload** - Update config without restart  
✅ **Multi-Version** - Minecraft 1.8 - 1.21+  
✅ **Lightweight** - JSON storage, no database needed  

## 💡 How It Works

1. New player joins server
2. First person to type "welcome [name]" gets rewarded
3. Leaderboard tracks top welcomers
4. Cooldowns prevent spam

**Example:**  
Player joins → "welcome Steve!" → Reward given! 💎

## 🚀 Quick Start

1. Drop JAR into plugins/ folder
2. Restart server
3. Customize plugins/FirstGreeter/config.yml
4. Use /fg reload to apply changes

## 🎮 Commands

- /fg leaderboard [page] - View top welcomers
- /fg stats [player] - View statistics
- /fg reload - Reload config
- /fg reset <player/all> - Reset data (admin)

**Aliases:** /fg, /firstgreeter, /greeter

## 🔐 Permissions

- firstgreeter.use - Basic commands (default: true)
- firstgreeter.admin - Admin access (default: OP)

## 🏆 Leaderboard Rankings

🥇 **Gold** - #1 welcomer  
🥈 **Silver** - #2 welcomer  
🥉 **Bronze** - #3 welcomer  
⭐ **Yellow** - Top 10  
💬 **White** - Everyone else  

## 🔗 Compatibility

**Server:** PaperMC, Spigot, Purpur  
**Versions:** 1.8 - 1.21+  
**Java:** 8, 11, 16, 17, 21  

Works with Vault, LuckPerms, EssentialsX, and all economy plugins!

## ⚙️ Simple Config

```yaml
welcome-detection:
  phrases: ["welcome", "wb", "hello", "hi"]
  timeout-seconds: 60

rewards:
  commands:
    - "give %player% diamond 1"
    - "eco give %player% 100"

cooldown:
  per-player-enabled: true
  per-player-seconds: 300
```

**Build a welcoming community today! 🌟**
